title: Enforce design-token uniformity and create DESIGN.md

Write docs/DESIGN.md with token conventions
Fix all violations found
Update scripts/harness.js with DESIGN.md validation step

name: employee-settings-redesign
title: Redesign employee module, merge schedules/time-logs, redesign system settings
description: Redesign employee module for accessibility, move schedule CRUD to settings, merge schedule assignments and time-logs into employees module, redesign settings as comprehensive hub (accessibility, logout, schedules, account info), remove settings button from admin header (keep for worker), remove floating accessibility button.
acceptance: Settings page redesigned with tabs: Accesibilidad, Horarios (admin), Cuenta, Cerrar sesión
Accessibility controls moved from floating floating button to Settings (accessibility-settings integrated)
Floating accessibility button (`app-accessibility`) removed from layout
Settings header button hidden for ADMIN, visible for WORKER
Schedule CRUD (horarios) accessible from Settings > Horarios for admin only
Time-logs moved from admin/manage/time-logs into employees module as sub-tab
Schedule assignments moved into employees module as worker detail sub-route
Horarios and Registros de Ingreso removed from manage.html navigation bar
Employee/users module improved with ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, screen-reader support
Harness passes all blocks after changes

tasks.description: Create standalone settings page with tabs: Accesibilidad, Horarios (admin-only), Cuenta, Cerrar sesión.

Move schedule assignments into employees module worker detail sub-route.

Improve accessibility of employee/users module (ARIA, keyboard, screen-reader).
Run harness, fix any failures, verify full build passes.

name: special-selection-backend-contract
title: Backend contract layer for /api/v1/special-selections (DTOs + service + cache + WS)
description: Create DTOs (request, response, suggested-price, history, schedule entry, group, addition, question, change-type WS payload), the SpecialSelection service (HTTP wrapper), and the SpecialSelectionCacheService (ResourceCache wrappers). Subscribe to /topic/special-selections/updated and route payloads to cache invalidation or update. No UI changes in this activity — pure data layer.
acceptance: DTOs exist under src/app/shared/models/dto/special-selections/ with full shapes from SPECIAL_SELECTION_UI_CHANGES.md §2.4-2.6
SpecialSelection service exposes: create, update, patchSchedule, patchPrice, delete, getById, list, availableNow, getHistory, getHistoryVersion, getHistoryRange, revertHistory, suggestPrice
SpecialSelectionsCacheService exposes ResourceCache instances: list, availableNow, per-id detail map, history per-id map, suggestedPrice (request-driven)
WS subscription on /topic/special-selections/updated updates availableNow + per-id caches; DELETE invalidates the per-id entry
Spanish toasts for 422 missing-variants response surface missingVariants array
Harness passes all blocks

tasks.description: Create DTOs under src/app/shared/models/dto/special-selections/: special-selection-request.ts, special-selection-response.ts, special-selection-suggested-price.ts (success + 422 shape), special-selection-history.ts (page, snapshot, range), special-selection-schedule-entry.ts, special-selection-group.ts, special-selection-addition.ts, special-selection-question.ts, special-selection-ws-payload.ts (changeType enum).

Create src/app/core/services/special-selections/special-selections.ts (class SpecialSelections) with all HTTP calls listed in acceptance. Create special-selections-cache.service.ts (class SpecialSelectionsCacheService, providedIn root) with ResourceCache wrappers + per-id Map for detail/history.

Wire WS subscription in SpecialSelectionsCacheService constructor: subscribeToTopic<SpecialSelectionWsPayload>('/topic/special-selections/updated'), on UPDATE/SCHEDULE_CHANGE/PRICE_CHANGE/REVERT call set on per-id cache, on DELETE invalidate per-id cache, always refresh availableNow. Use takeUntilDestroyed + DestroyRef.
Run harness, fix lint/build failures, write unit test for cache service covering UPDATE/DELETE payload routing. Update progress/current.md.

OrderResponse.OrderDetailResponse returns additionsResolved? with name + extraPrice + optionName and clarificationsResolved? with question + answer
Order.createOrder passes the new fields through
Order service surfaces 409 'fuera de horario' and 422 'falta cost' with Spanish messages
Kitchen STOMP consumer (if any in this repo) renders the new fields on the ticket
Harness passes all blocks

Add unitCost to SupplyVariantRequest/Response; surface warning badge in supply list when unitCost=0.

ProductCreateRequest + ProductUpdateRequest accept selectionType, baseRecipeEnabled, schedulingRequired
ProductListResponse + ProductResponse expose selectionType, baseRecipeEnabled, schedulingRequired
Product service getProducts accepts ?includeSelections=true filter param

name: admin-combo-list-history

Route /admin/manage/combos/:id/history renders history timeline
Combo list columns: nombre, precio base, resumen horario (chips Lun-Vie 11:00-15:00), active p-inputSwitch, acciones (Editar, Historial, Precio sugerido)
List uses SpecialSelectionsCacheService.list ResourceCache
Active toggle calls PATCH schedule or dedicated endpoint; show toast on 4xx
History timeline rows show changeType label (CREACIÓN/EDICIÓN/CAMBIO_HORARIO/CAMBIO_PRECIO/REVERSIÓN/ELIMINACIÓN), author, timestamp, version# badge, 'Actual' chip when isCurrent
Each row expandable to show JSON snapshot viewer (p-panel with monospaced pre block)

manage.html nav adds 'Combos' entry between 'Productos' and 'Menú'

Create combo-history.ts/html/css (history timeline) with p-timeline, JSON snapshot viewer, revert button + p-confirmDialog. Use cache.getHistory(id) + cache.revert(id, version).

name: admin-combo-editor
title: Admin: combo editor (4 tabs) + suggested-price modal
description: Build admin combo editor with 4 tabs: Grupos (drag-and-drop list with min/max badges + options), Adiciones (chip list with name/extra price/option name), Preguntas (form-builder style), Horario (7-day weekly grid). Save = PUT full graph; quick save = individual PATCH endpoints. Suggested-price modal reachable from list and editor.
acceptance: Route /admin/manage/combos/new renders empty editor
Route /admin/manage/combos/:id/edit renders editor prefilled from SpecialSelectionResponse
Editor uses p-tabView with 4 tabs: General, Grupos, Adiciones, Preguntas, Horario (General is the first tab)
General tab: name, description, basePrice, areaId, active, baseRecipeEnabled, schedulingRequired
Grupos tab: p-orderList with min/max badges; each group expandable to edit options (p-multiSelect from ProductOption list, extra price per option)
Adiciones tab: chip list with name + extra price + option name; 'Agregar adición' opens dialog to pick option + set extra price + displayOrder
Preguntas tab: form-builder: question text + required toggle + displayOrder; add/remove rows
Horario tab: 7-row grid (Lun-Dom), each row has time range p-inputMask HH:mm; add/remove ranges per day
Save button: PUT full graph; show toast on success/error
Quick save buttons: 'Guardar horario' (PATCH /schedule), 'Guardar precio' (PATCH /price)

Suggested-price modal: margin % input (default 30), 'Calcular' button calls suggest-price; on 200 show breakdown table + 'Aplicar al precio base'; on 422 show missing variants list with deep links to supply catalog
Editor validates schedule (start < end) before allowing save; show inline error
Harness passes all blocks

tasks.description: Create combo-editor.ts/html/css shell with p-tabView (5 tabs). General tab form with name/description/basePrice/areaId/active/baseRecipeEnabled/schedulingRequired. Wire to SpecialSelectionsCacheService for create vs update routing.

Build Grupos tab with drag-and-drop p-orderList of groups. Each row: name input + min/max p-inputNumber badges + required toggle + options p-multiSelect (loaded from ProductOption list). Adiciones tab with p-chip list + dialog for new addition. Preguntas tab with form-builder rows.
Build Horario tab with 7-row weekly grid (Lun-Dom). Each row: time range inputs HH:mm + add/remove buttons. Add validation: start < end per row, show inline error.

Create suggested-price.ts/html/css as p-dialog with margin % input, 'Calcular' button, success breakdown p-table + 'Aplicar al precio base' button, 422 missing-variants p-message with deep links to supply catalog.
Register routes + harness + tests. Harness green.

name: waiter-combo-picker-detail

Detail screen renders groups (with min/max badges), additions (chips with extra price), questions (text inputs). 60s refresh + WS subscription. Submit order with new fields.
acceptance: Waiter dashboard 'menu' tab shows 'Combos disponibles ahora' panel (replaces app-day-menu widget)
Panel uses SpecialSelectionsCacheService.availableNow; refreshes every 60s via setInterval + on WS message
Each combo = card with name, price ($XX.XX), components preview ('Elige: sopa, plato, bebida'), tap → /worker/waiter/combos/:id
Detail screen renders each group as section with min/max badges ('Sopa (obligatorio · elige 1)')
Each option selectable via p-button (single-select or multi-select per group.maxSelections)
Additions section: p-chip list with extra price, click to toggle
Questions section: p-inputText per question, required asterisk, validation on submit
Submit calls Order.createOrder with additionIds + clarifications, then clears picker + toasts success
Error 409 shows toast: 'Este menú no está disponible en este horario'
Error 400 shows toast listing required groups/clarifications
Harness passes all blocks
